summary: Strong second‑set performance highlighted by a soaring Morning Dew coda, captured on a decent matrix recording.
review: The reviewer raves that this is one of the best second sets of 1977 and a favorite of the later Keith/Donna era, noting the abundance of Garcia‑written tunes and an especially climactic coda on Morning Dew. No specific technical complaints are mentioned, implying a generally good matrix (soundboard + audience) source.

ai_rating.rationale: The show is praised as outstanding (high show weight), while the recording is described only positively with no issues, suggesting a good‑quality matrix source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity or flaws; reviewer’s enthusiasm implies an acceptable listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as one of the best of ’77, with a smooth flow leading into a climactic Morning Dew coda; overall performance described as a high point of the May East Coast run.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia‑written tunes highlighted, implying strong guitar/vocal work.
band_member_comments.Keys: Reference to the Keith and Donna era suggests keyboards were solid, though no specific comment.
